[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100100110 4
1 010110100 4
2 011100000 3
3 111000110 5
4 101001001 4
5 011101101 6
6 111111110 8
7 001101001 4
